title: Jobs at Remote
snippet:
Remote is a true global company. We do not have an office anywhere in the world. What we offer is the flexibility to work when and where you want, which means you can plan your schedule around your life (and not around meetings).

Most of our jobs are globally remote! Job boards often require us to select a location though, so the location you see under the job titles are for ...

title: Software Development Engineer, React JS / Front End (India)
snippet: We are looking for a skilled Software Development Engineer, Front End Responsibilities - Develop and maintain responsive web applications using React JS Tech stack - Collaborate with UX/UI designers to implement user-centric designs and ensure a seamless experience. - Optimize applications for maximum speed and scalability.

title: Senior Software Engineer, JavaScript/TypeScript (Remote)
snippet: By checking this box, you consent to the collection, use, processing, and disclosure of your personal data for recruitment marketing purposes and to receive business updates and notifications to receive communications per your stated preferences. Your personal data will be processed in accordance with Bjak's Recruitment Policy.
